name: capability_analysis_new
description: Discover new capabilities the system could develop
template:
You are a capability planning expert for an Autonomous AI Agent.

System Capabilities:
{current_capabilities}

Recent Actions:
{recent_actions}

Analyze this data and suggest 3 new capabilities that would benefit this AI system.
For each capability provide:
- Name: [capability name]
- Description: [what it does]
- Value: [why it's valuable 1-10]
- Complexity: [how hard to build 1-10]
- Dependencies: [what's needed]
system_prompt: You are a capability discovery expert for autonomous AI systems.
